title: AI in the Classroom: Revolutionizing Learning
passage:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is no longer a concept confined to science fiction; it is rapidly integrating into various aspects of our lives, and education is no exception.  The potential of AI to transform the learning landscape is immense, offering personalized experiences and streamlining administrative tasks.  One of the most significant applications of AI in education is adaptive learning platforms. These systems can analyse a student's performance in real-time, identifying areas of strength and weakness. Based on this analysis, the platform can then tailor the curriculum, providing extra practice on challenging topics or advancing students who demonstrate mastery. This individualized approach ensures that each student receives the support they need to succeed, moving away from the one-size-fits-all model that has long dominated traditional schooling.

Beyond personalized learning, AI can also empower educators by automating time-consuming tasks. Grading assignments, for instance, can be a laborious process. AI-powered tools can quickly and accurately assess objective questions and even provide feedback on written work, freeing up teachers' valuable time to focus on more impactful activities like lesson planning, one-on-one student interaction, and fostering critical thinking skills.  Furthermore, AI can assist in identifying students who might be struggling or at risk of falling behind. By analysing patterns in engagement, performance, and even attendance, AI can flag these students for early intervention, allowing educators to provide targeted support before issues escalate.

However, the integration of AI into education is not without its challenges. Concerns about data privacy and security are paramount.  Educators and institutions must ensure that student data collected by AI systems is protected and used ethically.  Another consideration is the potential for over-reliance on AI, which could diminish the crucial human element of teaching.  The role of a teacher extends beyond simply delivering information; it involves mentorship, emotional support, and the development of social skills, aspects that AI cannot replicate.  Therefore, a balanced approach is essential, where AI serves as a powerful tool to augment, rather than replace, the invaluable role of human educators.

questions.question: What is one of the primary benefits of AI in education mentioned in the passage?
options: B) Reducing the need for student interaction

questions.question: Adaptive learning platforms assess student performance to provide a uniform learning path for all students.

options: A) Lack of available AI technology
B) The cost of implementing AI systems
C) The potential for over-reliance on AI
D) The difficulty in training AI models

title: Working from Home: A New Way to Be Productive?
passage: Many companies are now letting their employees work from home. This is called remote work. Some people think working from home is great because they can save time on commuting. They don't have to travel to an office every day. This means they have more time for other things, like hobbies or family.  Also, some people find they can focus better at home. There are fewer distractions than in a busy office.  However, not everyone finds remote work easy. Some people miss the social interaction with colleagues. They might feel lonely.  It can also be hard to separate work life from home life.  When your office is your living room, it's easy to keep working too much or to not work enough.  Companies need to think about how to help their employees be productive and happy when they work remotely.

vocabulary.meaning: working from a location outside of the company's main office, usually from home.
the act of traveling between your home and your place of work.
things that stop you from giving your full attention to something.
feeling sad because you are alone or do not have friends.
to keep things apart or different.
achieving a lot; producing a lot of results.

questions.question: Remote work means working in a company's office.
What is one advantage of remote work mentioned in the passage?
Some people find it easier to focus when working from home.
What is one disadvantage of remote work for some people?
It is always easy to separate work life from home life when working remotely.
